toc.value: Changing Graph Colors in Energy Dashboard

frontMatter.title: How To Change Graph Colors in Energy Dashboard In Home Assistant
frontMatter.author: Amrut Prabhu
frontMatter.summary: In this article, we will look at how you can change colors for your energy graph in the energy dashboard of Home Assistant.
